ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Write your notes here and they'll stick to the page!
ast.target: 在此处写下您的笔记，它们会固定在页面上！

ast.name: title
ast.source: Arbitrarily classified birds that are a little harder to find, but worth the wait!
ast.target: 稍微难找一些，但值得等待的任意分类鸟类！

ast.name: alert
ast.source: Thank you for using Pocket Bird! You are on version: 2026.5.12
ast.target: 感谢您使用 Pocket Bird！您当前的版本是：2026.5.12

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Are you sure you want to delete this sticky note?
ast.target: 您确定要删除此便签吗？

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 Pocket Bird 版本 2026.5.12...

ast.name: log
ast.source: No user settings found in save data, starting fresh
ast.target: 在保存数据中未找到用户设置，正在全新启动

ast.name: log
ast.source: Sprite sheets loaded successfully, initializing bird...
ast.target: 精灵图集加载成功，正在初始化小鸟...

ast.name: log
ast.source: In iframe, skipping Birb script initialization
ast.target: 在 iframe 中，跳过 Birb 脚本初始化

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Aborting load due to newer load call
ast.target: 由于有更新的加载调用，正在中止加载

ast.name: description
ast.source: Native to North American and very social, though can be timid around people.
ast.target: 原产于北美，非常善于社交，但在人周围可能会胆怯。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Small, fluffy birds found in the snowy regions of Japan, these birds are highly sought after by ornithologists and nature photographers.
ast.target: 在日本雪域地区发现的小型、毛茸茸的鸟类，深受鸟类学家和自然摄影师的追捧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Native to the eastern United States, full of personality, and notably my wife's favorite bird.
ast.target: 原产于美国东部，个性十足，而且是我妻子最喜欢的鸟。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Native to western Europe, this is the quintessential robin. Quite friendly, you'll often find them searching for worms.
ast.target: 原产于西欧，这是典型的知更鸟。相当友好，你经常会看到它们在寻找蠕虫。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Native to the eastern United States, this strikingly red bird is hard to miss.
ast.target: 原产于美国东部，这种醒目的红色鸟类很难被忽视。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Coloured a brilliant yellow, this bird feeds almost entirely on the seeds of plants such as thistle, sunflowers, and coneflowers.
ast.target: 羽毛呈鲜艳的黄色，这种鸟几乎完全以蓟、向日葵和松果菊等植物的种子为食。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Agile birds that often roost in man-made structures, these birds are known to build nests near Ospreys for protection.
ast.target: 敏捷的鸟类，经常在人造建筑中栖息，这些鸟以在鱼鹰附近筑巢寻求保护而闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Native to Australia, these birds eat mainly mistletoe and in turn spread the seeds far and wide.
ast.target: 原产于澳大利亚，这些鸟主要以槲寄生为食，并反过来将种子传播到四面八方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Native to Australia, this striking robin can be found in Eucalyptus forests.
ast.target: 原产于澳大利亚，这种醒目的知更鸟可以在桉树林中找到。

ast.name: description
ast.source: While not a true robin, this social North American bird is so named due to its orange coloring. It seems unbothered by nearby humans.
ast.target: 虽然不是真正的知更鸟，但这种善于社交的北美鸟类因其橙色的羽毛而得名。它似乎对附近的人类毫不在意。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Native to the eastern United States, these little birds are known for their curious and energetic nature.
ast.target: 原产于美国东部，这些小鸟以其好奇和充满活力的天性而闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Native to North America, these small and curious birds are known for their distinctive call from which they get their name.
ast.target: 原产于北美，这些小巧好奇的鸟类以其独特的叫声而闻名，并因此得名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This loud and rambunctious bird is native to North America and is known for challenging anything in its path.
ast.target: 这种吵闹而喧闹的鸟原产于北美，以挑战路上的任何事物而闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Native across North America, these social birds will often be seen hopping along the ground in winter.
ast.target: 遍布北美，这些善于社交的鸟类在冬天经常被看到在地面上跳跃。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Native to North America, these highly social birds sing cheerful songs and are often seen at bird feeders.
ast.target: 原产于北美，这些高度社交的鸟类会唱出欢快的歌曲，经常在喂鸟器旁看到。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Descended from the Rock Dove, these once domesticated birds are often found in cities worldwide. Quite friendly and intelligent, they were favored companions of Nikola Tesla.
ast.target: 岩鸽的后代，这些曾经被驯化的鸟类经常在世界各地的城市中被发现。相当友好和聪明，它们是尼古拉·特斯拉喜爱的伙伴。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Native to India and southeast Asia, these birds are also known as Strawberry Finches due to their speckled plumage.
ast.target: 原产于印度和东南亚，这些鸟也被称为草莓雀，因其斑点羽毛。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Native to Australia, these bubblegum-pink puffballs are quieter than most, instead relying on their vibrant colours to attract partners.
ast.target: 原产于澳大利亚，这些泡泡糖粉色的绒球比大多数鸟类更安静，而是依靠其鲜艳的颜色来吸引伴侣。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This South American bird can be found in the Amazon rainforest, flashing its iridescent turquoise feathers high above in the canopy.
ast.target: 这种南美鸟类可以在亚马逊雨林中找到，在树冠高处闪烁着其虹彩般的绿松石色羽毛。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This vividly coloured finch is found throughout Central America and is known for the distinctive blue hood that crowns its head.
ast.target: 这种色彩鲜艳的雀鸟遍布中美洲，以其头顶独特的蓝色兜帽而闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A remarkably colourful bird, this North American species is quite difficult to observe despite its vivid palette due to its shy nature and vulnerable habitat.
ast.target: 一种色彩异常丰富的鸟类，这种北美物种尽管拥有鲜艳的调色板，但由于其害羞的天性和脆弱的栖息地，相当难以观察。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Endemic to the highlands of Mexico, this bird has the rare distinction of being one of the very few toxic birds in the world.
ast.target: 墨西哥高地特有，这种鸟有一个罕见的区别，是世界上为数不多的有毒鸟类之一。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As the name suggests, this little green bird is only found on the island of Cuba and is known for being particularly round.
ast.target: 顾名思义，这种绿色的小鸟只在古巴岛上发现，并以特别圆润而闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Native to Sub-Saharan Africa, these small starlings are known for being the most vividly purple birds in the world.
ast.target: 原产于撒哈拉以南非洲，这些小型椋鸟以是世界上颜色最鲜艳的紫色鸟类而闻名。

ast.name: description
ast.source: It's like you're wearing nothing at all!
ast.target: 就像你什么都没穿一样！

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mark of a true gentlebird.

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sure, vikings never actually wore this style of helmet, but why let facts get in the way of good fashion?
ast.target: 当然，维京人实际上从未戴过这种风格的头盔，但为什么要让事实妨碍时尚呢？

ast.name: description
ast.source: You can't jam with the console cowboys without the appropriate attire.
ast.target: 没有合适的服装，你无法与控制台牛仔们一起即兴演奏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: It's a fez. Fezzes are cool.
ast.target: 这是一顶土耳其毡帽。土耳其毡帽很酷。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grants the bearer terrifying mystical power, but luckily birds only use it to summon old ladies with bread crumbs.
ast.target: 赋予佩戴者可怕的神秘力量，但幸运的是，鸟类只用它来召唤带着面包屑的老太太。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Birds unfortunately only ever hit 'fowl' balls...
ast.target: 不幸的是，鸟类只打“禽类”球...

ast.name: description
ast.source: To be fair, this is less of a hat and more of a dirt clod that your pet happened to pick up.
ast.target: 公平地说，这更像是一块你的宠物碰巧捡起来的土块，而不是一顶帽子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Keeps feathers warm on those long migrations south!
ast.target: 在漫长的南迁途中保持羽毛温暖！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Perfect for frolicking through enchanted flower fields.
ast.target: 非常适合在迷人的花田中嬉戏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A classic design, though keep away from water as this particular hat is seemingly unable to float.
ast.target: 经典设计，但请远离水，因为这顶特定的帽子似乎无法漂浮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A traditional Spanish hat that stays put even in the wildest of sword fights.
ast.target: 一顶传统的西班牙帽子，即使在最激烈的剑斗中也能保持原位。
